# Traefik TLS certificates

**Runtime path (VM):** `/opt/platform/config/traefik/certs/`  
**Generated by:** `platform/infra/scripts/system/generate_certs.sh`

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `nano.platform.crt` / `nano.platform.key` | Wildcard `*.nano.platform` — Traefik HTTPS |
| `rootCA.crt` | Import into browser/OS trust store (presenter laptop) |

Do **not** commit private keys. Files are created on `vagrant provision` / `./cli.sh up`.

**Verify on VM:**
```bash
ls -la /opt/platform/config/traefik/certs/
openssl x509 -in /opt/platform/config/traefik/certs/nano.platform.crt -noout -subject -dates
curl -vk https://grafana.nano.platform/login 2>&1 | head -20
```
